name: IdsEdwLoadAplRunCycUpd

text.value: WITH CTE AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'APPEALS' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD UNION SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'MEDSLTNS' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'APPEALS' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.MedSltnsBeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD UNION SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'TELLIGEN' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'APPEALS' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.TelligenBeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD UNION SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'NDBH' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'APPEALS' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.NdbhBeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD ) UPDATE A SET A.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC AS A INNER JOIN CTE ON A.SRC_SYS_CD = CTE.SRC_SYS_CD AND A.SUBJ_CD = CTE.SUBJ_CD AND A.TRGT_SYS_CD = CTE.TRGT_SYS_CD AND A.RUN_CYC_NO >= CTE.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE A.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Annotations:
Job Name: IdsEdwLoadAplRunCycUpd
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Appeals with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW Appeals Load Indicator Update
